content.fact_text: Centralized logging subsystem providing structured, performance-optimized, and secure JSON logging for the ecommerce backend.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements a production-grade, structured, and asynchronous logging subsystem using the 'pino' library. Configures automatic PII redaction, standard formatting, and context-enrichment for auditability and debugging. Uses singleton pattern for the global logger and provides a factory for module-specific loggers.
provenance_data.utility: Provides consistent, secure, and production-ready observability across all microservices, facilitating debugging, auditing, and operational monitoring.
